name: Subscription
description: Subscription schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE Subscription Service API

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group ID this subscription is associated with.

product_name.description: Product name (e.g., Prisma Access, Prisma SD-WAN).

licensed_quantity.description: Total licensed quantity (e.g., number of users or devices).

licensed_unit.description: Unit of measure for the licensed quantity (e.g., users, devices, Mbps).

support_level.description: Support tier included with the subscription.
